It also provides information and communications infrastructure for Internet-based services, e-commerce, customer relationship management, and information technology (IT) related services. In addition, the company offers managed IT outsourcing, Internet-based purchasing, IT consulting and professional, bills printing and other related value-added, and air transportation services; and full-services customer rewards and loyalty programs. Further, it sells Wi-Fi access equipment; and distributes Filipino channels and content. As of December 31, 2020, it had 72,933,839 mobile broadband subscribers; 3,042,815 fixed line subscribers; and 3,090,118 fixed wireless broadband subscribers. The company was formerly known as Philippine Long Distance Telephone Company and changed its name to PLDT Inc. in July 2016. PLDT Inc. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Makati City, the Philippines.

name: Plug Power Inc.
summary: Plug Power Inc. provides hydrogen fuel cell turnkey solutions for the electric mobility and stationary power markets in North America and Europe. It focuses on proton exchange membrane (PEM) fuel cell and fuel processing technologies, fuel cell/battery hybrid technologies, and related hydrogen storage and dispensing infrastructure. The company offers GenDrive, a hydrogen fueled PEM fuel cell system that provides power to material handling electric vehicles; GenFuel, a hydrogen fueling delivery, generation, storage, and dispensing system; GenCare, an ongoing maintenance and service program for GenDrive and GenSure fuel cells, GenFuel products, and ProGen engines; and GenSure, a stationary fuel cell solution that provides modular PEM fuel cell power to support the backup and grid-support power requirements of the telecommunications, transportation, and utility sectors. It also provides GenKey, a turn-key solution for transitioning to fuel cell power; and ProGen, a fuel cell stack and engine technology used in mobility and stationary fuel cell systems, and as engines in electric delivery vans. The company offers its products to retail-distribution and manufacturing businesses through direct product sales force, original equipment manufacturers, and dealer networks. Plug Power Inc. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Latham, New York.

It is involved in the exploration, extraction, processing, and reclamation of gold, silver, copper, zinc, and platinum group metals. The company's flagship project is the Kyzyl property located in the East Kazakhstan Region, Kazakhstan. Polymetal International plc was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Limassol, Cyprus.

summary: PIERER Mobility AG is an Austrian motorcycle manufacturer that produces motorcycles, scooters, and e-bikes under brands such as KTM, Husqvarna, and GASGAS. The company also manufactures motorcycle components. PIERER Mobility AG is headquartered in Wels, Austria.

name: PEPINNINI MINERALS LTD.
summary: PepinNini Minerals Ltd is an Australian exploration company focused on discovering and developing projects with battery minerals and strategic metal resources. The company has projects in Argentina and Australia, focusing on lithium, graphite, and other minerals. The company is based in Adelaide, South Australia.

name: PTC Inc.
summary: PTC Inc. operates as software and services company in the Americas, Europe, and the Asia Pacific. The company operates in two segments, Software Products and Professional Services. It offers ThingWorx, an IIoT platform that enables customers to address digital transformation of their operations, products, and services; ThingWorx Solution Central, a centralized portal in the cloud that allows users of ThingWorx to discover, deploy, and manage ThingWorx applications; and ThingWorx Kepware, which enables users to connect, manage, monitor, and control disparate devices and software applications. The company also provides Vuforia Studio, a cloud-based tool that enables industrial enterprises to author and publish augmented reality (AR) experiences; Vuforia Expert Capture that chronicles the real-time movements of a person wearing an AR headset; Vuforia Engine technology for application development; Vuforia Chalk, a collaboration and remote assistance solution; and Vuforia Spatial Toolbox technology to accelerate the development of spatial computing prototypes and use cases. In addition, it offers Onshape, a cloud-native multi-tenant platform that unites computer-aided design with data management, collaboration tools, and real-time analytics; Creo, a suite of product design software, which provides capabilities for design, real-time simulation, additive manufacturing, design flexibility, advanced assembly design, piping and cabling design, advanced surfacing, virtual prototyping, and other design functions; and Windchill, a product lifecycle management software. Further, the company provides Integrity, an application lifecycle management solution; Servigistics, service parts management solution; and consulting, implementation, training, cloud, and license and support services. The company was formerly known as Parametric Technology Corporation and changed its name to PTC Inc. in January 2013. PTC Inc. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.

name: GEN III OIL CORP.
summary: Gen III Oil Corporation is a Canadian clean technology company focused on developing and commercializing technologies to re-refine used motor oil into high-quality base oils. Their process removes contaminants and restores the oil to its original specifications. The company is based in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

name: GREAT ELM GROUP  NEW-,001
summary: Great Elm Group, Inc. is an alternative asset manager that provides investment management services. The company invests in various sectors, including real estate and other alternative investments. The company is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts.

name: Mowi ASA
summary: Mowi ASA, a seafood company, produces and supplies farmed salmon products worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Feed, Farming, and Sales and Marketing. It is involved in the salmon feed production, salmon farming and primary processing, and seafood secondary processing activities. The company offers whole gutted fish, including Label Rouge and organic salmon; and white fish and other seafood products, as well as fillets, steaks, cutlets, portions, loins, kebabs, and steak combos. It also provides value added products, such as breaded, pre-fried, dusted, marinated, grilled, battered, topped, filled with sauce, delicatessen, fresh fish ready meal, and smoked fish products. The company offers its products under the Mowi, Appeti'Marine, Mowi Salmon, Donegal Silver, Admiral's, Pieters, Laschinger, Kritsen, Ducktrap River, Harbour Salmon Co., Rebel Fish, Supreme Salmon, Olav's, Northern Harvest, and Mowi Nutrition brand names. The company was formerly known as Marine Harvest ASA and changed its name to Mowi ASA in December 2018. Mowi ASA was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.

name: Mowi ASA
summary: Mowi ASA, a seafood company, produces and supplies farmed salmon products worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Feed, Farming, and Sales and Marketing. It is involved in the salmon feed production, salmon farming and primary processing, and seafood secondary processing activities. The company offers whole gutted fish, including Label Rouge and organic salmon; and white fish and other seafood products, as well as fillets, steaks, cutlets, portions, loins, kebabs, and steak combos. The company was formerly known as Marine Harvest ASA and changed its name to Mowi ASA in December 2018. Mowi ASA was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.

name: PNE AG  NA O.N.
summary: PNE AG is a German company that develops, constructs, and operates onshore and offshore wind farms and photovoltaic systems. The company provides services across the entire value chain of renewable energy projects, from planning and development to operation and maintenance. PNE AG is headquartered in Cuxhaven, Germany.

name: Pan Orient Energy Corp.
summary: Pan Orient Energy Corp., a junior oil and natural gas company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties in Thailand, Indonesia, and Canada. It holds a 100% interest in the L53/48 concession located in west of Bangkok, Thailand; a 49% interest in the East Jabung production sharing contract located in South Sumatra, Indonesia; and a 50% interest in the Sawn Lake property comprising 88 contiguous sections of heavy oil sands leases situated in the central Alberta Peace River Oil Sands area. The company is based in Calgary, Canada.

name: PNC FINL SERVICES GRP DL5
summary: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. is a diversified financial services company providing retail banking, corporate and institutional banking, asset management, and residential mortgage banking. The company operates primarily in the United States. PNC is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

name: Pentair plc
summary: Pentair plc provides various smart water solutions worldwide. It operates through two segments, Consumer Solutions; and Industrial & Flow Technologies. The Consumer Solutions segment designs, manufactures, and sells residential and commercial pool equipment and accessories, including pumps, filters, heaters, lights, automatic controls, automatic cleaners, maintenance equipment, and pool accessories for residential and commercial pool maintenance, repair, renovation, service, and construction applications; and water treatment products and systems comprising pressure tanks, control valves, activated carbon products, conventional filtration products, and point-of-entry and point-of-use systems for the use in residential whole home water filtration, drinking water filtration, and water softening solutions, as well as in commercial total water management and filtration in foodservice operations. This segment offers its products under the Everpure, Kreepy Krauly, Pelican, Pentair Water Solutions, RainSoft, and Sta-Rite brands. The Industrial & Flow Technologies segment manufactures and sells fluid treatment products, such as advanced membrane filtration products, separation systems, and membrane bioreactors; water supply and disposal, solid handling, fluid transfer, and turbine pumps; and valves, spray nozzles, process filtration systems, and gas recovery solutions for food and beverage, fluid separation technologies, water and wastewater treatment, water wells, pressure boosting, fire suppression, flood control, agricultural irrigation, crop spray, fluid circulation and transfer, fluid delivery, ion exchange, desalination, residential and municipal wells, and wastewater solids handling applications. This segment offers its products under the Pentair, Aurora, Berkeley, Codeline, Fairbanks-Nijhuis, Haffmans, Hydromatic, Hypro, Jung Pumpen, Myers, Sta-Rite, Shurflo, S√É¬ºdmo, and X-Flow brands. Pentair plc was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.

name: DERICHEBOURG S.A. EO -,25
summary: Derichebourg S.A. is a global player in environmental services, including recycling, recovery, and collection of ferrous and non-ferrous metals. They also provide a range of services to businesses and public services, such as waste management, industrial cleaning, and facility management. The company is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: PASINEX RESOURCES LTD.
summary: Pasinex Resources Ltd. is a base metal exploration company focused on high-grade zinc deposits in Turkey and North America. They explore, develop, and operate mineral properties. The company aims to create shareholder value through discovery and development of zinc resources.

name: BALLARD PWR SYS
summary: Ballard Power Systems is a global provider of innovative clean energy fuel cell solutions. They design, develop, manufacture, and service fuel cell products for various applications, including heavy-duty vehicles, material handling, and stationary power. The company is headquartered in Burnaby, British Columbia, Canada.

name: PROOFPOINT INC.  DL-,0001
summary: Proofpoint, Inc. is a cybersecurity company that provides cloud-based solutions for email security, threat intelligence, and compliance. Their services help organizations protect their data, employees, and brand from cyberattacks. The company is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California.

name: CARNIVAL PLC
summary: Carnival plc is a global cruise company that operates a portfolio of cruise brands, including Carnival Cruise Line, Princess Cruises, Holland America Line, and Costa Cruises. They offer a range of cruise vacations to destinations around the world. The company is headquartered in Southampton, United Kingdom.

name: Portofino Resources Inc.
summary: Portofino Resources Inc. acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties in the Americas. The company holds an option to acquire 100% interests in the Sapawe West property that comprises 3 claims totaling 1,147 hectares located in the Schwenger and McCaul Townships, Ontario; the Gold Creek property comprising 5 mining claims containing 197 contiguous cell units covering an area of approximately 4,036 hectares located primarily in the Duckworth Township, Ontario; and the Melema West gold property covering an area of 869 hectares located to the northeast of the town of Atikokan, Ontario. Its properties also include the South of Otter project covering an area of 5,363 hectares located to the southeast of the town of Red Lake, Ontario; and the lithium salar properties in Catamarca, Argentina. In addition, the company has option assignment agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Bruce lake Property covering an area of 1,428 hectares located in the Red lake, Ontario; and interest in the Allison Lake North lithium and rare elements property that comprises 4 claims covering an area of 1,618 hectares located in northwestern Ontario. The company was formerly known as Crude Investments Corp. and changed its name to Portofino Resources Inc. in March 2012. Portofino Resources Inc. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: Papa John's International, Inc.
summary: Papa John's International, Inc. is a pizza delivery company that franchises and operates pizza restaurants. They offer a variety of pizzas, sides, and desserts, primarily through delivery and carryout channels. The company is headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky.

name: PEOPLE'S UTD FINL DL -,01
summary: People's United Financial, Inc. was a bank holding company that provided commercial banking, retail banking, and wealth management services to individual, corporate, and municipal customers through its subsidiary bank, People's United Bank. It has been acquired by M&T Bank Corporation. It was headquartered in Bridgeport, Connecticut.

name: FLUTTER ENTMT PLC  EO-,09
summary: Flutter Entertainment PLC is a global sports-betting and gaming company offering sports betting, gaming, and entertainment products to millions of customers worldwide. Its brands include FanDuel, Sky Betting & Gaming, PokerStars, Paddy Power, and Betfair. The company is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.

name: NEXT DIGITAL LTD.
summary: NEXT Digital Ltd. (formerly known as Next Media) is a Hong Kong-based media company primarily engaged in publishing and printing newspapers and magazines, as well as digital media operations. The company is known for its pro-democracy stance and its flagship publication, Apple Daily. Due to political suppression by the CCP in Hong Kong, the company ceased operations in 2021.

name: PPG IND. INC.  DL 1,666
summary: PPG Industries Inc. is a global supplier of paints, coatings, and specialty materials. The company serves customers in a wide range of industries, including construction, consumer products, industrial and transportation markets and aftermarkets. PPG Industries is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

name: POLAR POWER INC. DL-,0001
summary: Polar Power, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells direct current (DC) power systems, solar hybrid power systems, and lithium battery solutions for applications in telecommunications, marine, military, and industrial markets. The company's products provide backup power, remote power, and distributed power solutions. Polar Power is headquartered in Gardena, California.

name: KERING S.A. INH.  EO 4
summary: Kering S.A. is a global luxury group that manages and develops a portfolio of luxury houses in fashion, leather goods, jewelry and watches. Its brands include Gucci, Saint Laurent, Bottega Veneta, Balenciaga, Alexander McQueen, and others. The company is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: Photronics, Inc.
summary: Photronics, Inc. is a leading worldwide manufacturer of photomasks. Photomasks are high precision quartz plates containing microscopic images of electronic circuits, which are used in the fabrication of semiconductors and other microelectronic components. The company is headquartered in Brookfield, Connecticut.

name: PETREL RES PLC  EO -,0125
summary: Petrel Resources PLC is an oil and gas exploration and production company. It focuses on identifying and acquiring exploration and development opportunities in various regions. The company is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.

name: Starpharma Holdings Ltd.
summary: Starpharma Holdings Limited is an Australian biopharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes pharmaceutical and medical products based on its proprietary DEP® drug delivery technology. Their lead product is VivaGel® (SPL7013) for the treatment and prevention of bacterial vaginosis (BV). The company is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.

name: Petroteq Energy Inc.
summary: Petroteq Energy Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the oil sands mining and oil extraction operations in the United States. The company mines and extracts oil from tar sands. It holds rights to mine, extract, and produce oil and associated hydrocarbons and minerals from oil sands containing heavy oil and bitumen under mineral leases covering approximately 2,541.76 acres in the Asphalt Ridge area of Utah, including 1,229.82 acres held under the TMC Mineral Lease and an additional 833.03 and 478.91 acres, respectively, held under the State of Utah's School and Institutional Trust Land Administration Leases. The company also operates rights under five leases covering lands consisting of approximately 5,960 acres situated in Uintah, Wayne, and Garfield Counties, Utah. In addition, it is developing a blockchain-powered supply chain management platform for the oil and gas industry. The company was formerly known as MCW Energy Group Limited and changed its name to Petroteq Energy Inc. in May 2017. Petroteq Energy Inc. is based in Sherman Oaks, California.

name: PETMED EXPRES.INC DL-,001
summary: PetMed Express, Inc. (also known as 1-800-PetMeds) is an online pet pharmacy that offers prescription and non-prescription pet medications, health supplies, and nutritional products for dogs, cats, and horses. The company provides a convenient way for pet owners to purchase pet healthcare products. PetMed Express is headquartered in Delray Beach, Florida.

name: HARBOUR ENERGY  LS-000001
summary: Harbour Energy plc is an independent oil and gas company focused on acquiring, developing, and producing oil and gas reserves. The company operates primarily in the UK North Sea and Southeast Asia. Harbour Energy is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: Biotage AB
summary: Biotage AB (publ), a life science company, provides separation technologies in the areas of organic and analytical chemistry, biomolecules, as well as for industrial scale up applications. It offers sample preparation solutions; horizon food and environmental products; microwave synthesis solutions; peptide synthesis and purification solutions; flash purification products; work-up products; evaporation and concentration solutions; and industrial and large scale products, such as flash purification, metal scavenging, reagents and scavengers, and custom resins. The company sells its products to pharmaceutical and biotechnical companies, contract research and manufacturing organizations, government authorities, and academic institutions; and commercial labs, hospital, CROs, bio-analytical laboratories, food manufacturers, and labs performing for food safety and environmental analysis. It operates in North and South America, Europe, Japan, China, South Korea, India, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia Pacific. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.

name: PROCTER GAMBLE
summary: Procter & Gamble is a multinational consumer goods corporation. It manufactures and markets a wide range of products, including personal care, household cleaning, and healthcare items. The company is headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.

name: PROSEGUR NOM.  EO -,06
summary: Prosegur is a global security company providing security solutions. Their services include surveillance, guarding, technology, and cyber security services to businesses and homes. The company is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: Ralph Lauren Corporation Class A
summary: Ralph Lauren Corporation designs, markets, and distributes lifestyle products in North America, Europe, Asia, and internationally. The company offers apparel, including a range of men's, women's, and children's clothing accessories, which comprise sandals, eyewear, watches, fashion and fine jewelry, scarves, hats, gloves, umbrellas, and belts, as well as leather goods, such as handbags, luggage, small leather goods, and belts; home products consisting of bedding and bath products, furniture, fabrics and wallpapers, lightings, tabletops, floorcoverings, and giftware; and fragrances. It sells apparel and accessories under the Ralph Lauren Collection, Ralph Lauren Purple Label, Polo Ralph Lauren, Double RL, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Polo Golf Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Golf, RLX Ralph Lauren, Polo Ralph Lauren Children, Chaps, Club Monaco, and other brand names; women's fragrances under the Ralph Lauren Collection, Woman by Ralph Lauren, Romance Collection, Ralph Collection, and Big Pony Women's brand names; and men's fragrances under the Polo Blue, Safari, Purple Label, Polo Red, Polo Green, Polo Black, Polo Supreme, Polo Sport, and Big Pony Men's brand names. The company's restaurant concepts include The Polo Bar in New York City; RL Restaurant in Chicago; Ralph's in Paris; and Ralph's Coffee concept. Ralph Lauren Corporation sells its products to department stores, specialty stores, and golf and pro shops, as well as directly to consumers through its retail stores, concession-based shop-within-shops, and its digital commerce sites. The company directly operates 530 retail stores and 654 concession-based shop-within-shops; and operates 80 Ralph Lauren stores, 31 Ralph Lauren concession shops, and 139 Club Monaco stores and shops through licensing partners. Ralph Lauren Corporation was founded in 1967 and is based in New York, New York.

name: PRADA SPA  EO 1
summary: Prada S.p.A. is an Italian luxury fashion house. The company designs, manufactures, and distributes clothing, leather goods, footwear, accessories, and fragrances. Prada is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

name: PRICER AB B  SK-10
summary: Pricer AB develops and sells electronic shelf labels (ESLs) and associated infrastructure. Their products enable retailers to digitally manage pricing and product information on store shelves. The company is headquartered in Sweden.

name: Prudential plc
summary: Prudential plc, through its subsidiaries, provides life and health insurance, and retirement and asset management solutions to individuals in Asia, the United States, and Africa. It offers health and protection, as well as savings products, such as participating, linked, and other traditional products; mutual funds; life insurance; property and casualty insurance; and group insurance. The company also provides insurance against common critical illnesses, including cancer, stroke, and heart attack; tropical disease protection, such as dengue, malaria, and measles; and food poisoning, minor burns, broken bones, and accident income support, as well as investment fund products. Prudential plc provides its products and services through agency sales force, banks, and brokers. The company was founded in 1848 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.

name: Proto Labs, Inc.
summary: Proto Labs, Inc. is a digital manufacturing company that provides rapid prototyping and on-demand production services. They utilize injection molding, CNC machining, and 3D printing to create custom parts for product developers and engineers. The company is headquartered in Maple Plain, Minnesota.

name: PT Perusahaan Perkebunan London Sumatra Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Perusahaan Perkebunan London Sumatra Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the plantation business in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates in four segments: Oil Palm Products, Seeds, and Others. It offers crude palm oil, palm kernel oil, rubber, cocoa, tea, and oil palm seeds. The company also operates palm oil mills, crumb rubber processing facilities, sheet rubber processing facilities, cocoa factories, and tea factories. In addition, it engages in research, processing, trading, marketing, industrial, photography, air transportation for photography, mapping, and agency/representative activities; and invests in agricultural technology and cultivation, as well as agriculture, forestry, and fishery businesses. The company was founded in 1906 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Perusahaan Perkebunan London Sumatra Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk.

name: PSI Software AG
summary: PSI Software AG develops and sells software systems and products for the energy supply, production, infrastructure, software technology, internet applications, and business consultancy sectors worldwide. The company operates in two segments, Energy Management and Production Management. The Energy Management segment provides intelligent solutions for utility companies in the electricity, gas, oil, and water sectors, as well as for the district heating sector. It develops control systems for electrical grids, cross-sector control systems, and gas and pipeline management systems; and products for energy trading, energy distribution, smart grids, power plant optimization, public transport system, and gas industry planning. The Production Management segment offers software products and solutions for planning and controlling production processes in metals production, logistics, mechanical engineering, and automotive manufacturing. The company also offers a range of data processing services; sells electronic equipment; and operates data processing systems. PSI Software AG was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: PharmaSGP Holding SE
summary: PharmaSGP Holding SE is a German company that develops, produces, and markets over-the-counter (OTC) pharmaceuticals and other healthcare products. Their products are sold in pharmacies and drugstores across Europe. The company is headquartered in Gräfelfing, Germany.

name: Sernova Corp.
summary: Sernova Corp., a clinical-stage regenerative medicine therapeutics company, focuses on the development and commercializing of its proprietary Cell Pouch System and associated technologies, including the cell pouch and systemic and/or locally immune protected therapeutic cells and tissues. Its Cell Pouch system is a medical device designed to create a vascularized tissue environment for the transplantation and engraftment of therapeutic cells or tissues for the treatment of chronic diseases, such as diabetes, hemophilia, and hypothyroid disease. The company has a research collaboration with AgeX Therapeutics, Inc. to generate immune-protected universal therapeutic cells. Sernova Corp. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in London, Canada.

name: PROSIEBENSAT.1  NA O.N.
summary: ProSiebenSat.1 Media SE is a German media company. It operates a variety of television channels, digital platforms, and content production businesses. The company is headquartered in Unterföhring, Germany.

name: CoreCivic, Inc.
summary: CoreCivic, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and manages private correctional, detention, and reentry facilities. The company contracts with government agencies to provide inmate housing and related services. CoreCivic is headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee.

name: HC2 HOLDINGS  DL-,01
summary: HC2 Holdings, Inc. is a diversified holding company, which seeks opportunities to acquire and grow businesses that can generate sustainable free cash flow and attractive returns. The company operates through various segments including Construction, Energy, Telecommunications, Life Sciences, and Insurance. HC2 Holdings is headquartered in New York, NY.

name: PHAROL SGPS SA  EO 0,03
summary: Pharol, SGPS SA is a Portuguese holding company with investments in telecommunications and other sectors. The company's primary asset was a stake in Oi S.A., a Brazilian telecommunications company. Pharol is based in Lisbon, Portugal.

name: PLANTRONICS INC.  DL-,01
summary: Plantronics, Inc., now known as Poly, is a global communications company that provides audio and video solutions for businesses and consumers. Their products include headsets, speakerphones, video conferencing equipment, and software, with headquarters in San Jose, California. Poly aims to create human connection through technology.

name: PALATIN TECHS  DL-,01
summary: Palatin Technologies, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company developing targeted, receptor-specific peptide therapeutics for diseases with significant unmet medical need and commercial potential. Their primary focus is on developing first-in-class therapeutics for inflammatory and autoimmune diseases and diseases of the eye. The company is headquartered in Cranbury, New Jersey.

name: PTT PUBLIC CO FOREIGN BA1
summary: PTT Public Company Limited is a Thailand-based energy company engaged in the exploration, production, refining, and distribution of oil, gas, and petrochemical products. The company operates through various segments, including upstream petroleum and gas, downstream petroleum, and petrochemicals, with headquarters in Bangkok, Thailand. PTT is one of the largest companies in Thailand.

name: PTT EXPL.+PROD.-FGN.- BA1
summary: PTT Exploration and Production Public Company Limited (PTTEP) is a Thailand-based exploration and production company focused on oil and natural gas. The company engages in exploration, development, and production of petroleum both domestically and internationally, with headquarters in Bangkok, Thailand. PTTEP is a subsidiary of PTT Public Company Limited.

name: Palantir Technologies Inc. Class A
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. builds and deploys software platforms for the intelligence community in the United States to assist in counterterrorism investigations and operations. It also serves other industries, such as financial services, energy, healthcare, and manufacturing. The company is headquartered in Denver, Colorado.

name: PUBLICIS GRP INH. EO 0,40
summary: Publicis Groupe S.A. is a global advertising and public relations company. The company offers a range of services, including digital transformation, creative and media services, and healthcare communications. Publicis Groupe is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: PULTE GROUP INC.  DL -,01
summary: PulteGroup, Inc. is a home construction company that builds and sells single-family detached homes, townhouses, condominiums, and duplexes. The company operates through its brand portfolio, including Pulte Homes, Centex, Del Webb, DiVosta Homes, and John Wieland Homes and Neighborhoods. PulteGroup is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.

name: Pulse Seismic Inc.
summary: Pulse Seismic Inc. acquires, markets, and licenses two-dimensional (2D) and three-dimensional (3D) seismic data for the energy sector in Western Canada. The company's library covers principal areas in Alberta, Northeast British Columbia, and Saskatchewan, as well as includes portions of the Northwest Territories, Yukon, Manitoba, and Montana. Its seismic data is used by oil and natural gas exploration and development companies. The company owns and manages licensable seismic data library that consists of approximately 65,310 net square kilometers of 3D seismic; and 8,29,207 linear kilometers of 2D seismic data. It serves to the Canadian Oil and Gas exploration and development industry. The company was formerly known as Pulse Data Inc. and changed its name to Pulse Seismic Inc. in May 2009. Pulse Seismic Inc. was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.

name: PARTNER CMNCTS ADR/1 O.N.
summary: Partner Communications Company Ltd. provides telecommunications services in Israel. The company offers mobile, fixed-line telephony, internet, and television services to residential and business customers, with headquarters in Rosh HaAyin, Israel. Partner Communications operates under the brand name "Partner".

name: BIOSEARCH S.A.INH. EO-,24
summary: Biosearch, S.A. is a Spanish biotechnology company focused on researching, developing, and marketing products in the food and pharmaceutical sectors. The company's products include ingredients for functional foods, probiotics, and omega-3 fatty acids, with headquarters in Granada, Spain. Biosearch focuses on developing innovative solutions for health and nutrition.

name: PUMA SE
summary: PUMA SE, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, sells, and markets footwear, apparel, and accessories in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Americas and, the Asia Pacific. The company offers performance and sport-inspired lifestyle products in categories, such as football, cricket, handball, rugby, volleyball, running, training and fitness, golf, and motorsports. It also issues licenses to independent partners to design, develop, manufacture, and sell watches, glasses, safety shoes, and gaming accessories such as the Playseat. The company sells its products through PUMA retail stores and factory outlets, as well as through online stores. It offers its products primarily under the PUMA and Cobra Golf brand names. The company was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Herzogenaurach, Germany.

name: Public Storage
summary: Public Storage, a member of the S&P 500 and FT Global 500, is a REIT that primarily acquires, develops, owns and operates self-storage facilities. At September 30, 2020, we had: (i) interests in 2,504 self-storage facilities located in 38 states with approximately 171 million net rentable square feet in the United States, (ii) an approximate 35% common equity interest in Shurgard Self Storage SA (Euronext Brussels:SHUR) which owned 239 self-storage facilities located in seven Western European nations with approximately 13 million net rentable square feet operated under the √Ç¬ìShurgard√Ç¬î brand and (iii) an approximate 42% common equity interest in PS Business Parks, Inc. (NYSE:PSB) which owned and operated approximately 28 million rentable square feet of commercial space at September 30, 2020. Our headquarters are located in Glendale, California.

name: Paladin Energy Ltd
summary: Paladin Energy Ltd. is an Australian uranium company engaged in the exploration and development of uranium projects. The company's primary asset is the Langer Heinrich Mine in Namibia, with headquarters in Perth, Australia. Paladin Energy is focused on becoming a leading uranium producer.

name: PULSION Medical Systems SE
summary: PULSION Medical Systems SE engages in the development and sale of monitoring systems and disposables for diagnosis and treatment of patients worldwide. The company offers its principal products in the fields of anesthesia, surgical and internal intensive care medicine, and cardiology, as well as ophthalmology and tumor therapy. PULSION Medical Systems SE was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Feldkirchen, Germany.

name: EyePoint, Inc.
summary: Eyepoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative ophthalmic products for the treatment of eye disorders. The company leverages its Durasert technology to deliver sustained drug release for various indications. Eyepoint Pharmaceuticals is headquartered in Watertown, Massachusetts.

name: Pierre et Vacances SA
summary: Pierre & Vacances SA is a French tourism company that manages and markets holiday resorts, apartments, and hotels. The company operates under brands like Pierre & Vacances, Center Parcs, and Maeva, with headquarters in Paris, France. Pierre & Vacances offers a range of leisure and hospitality services.

name: Penn Virginia Corporation
summary: Penn Virginia Corporation, an independent oil and gas company, engages in the onshore exploration, development, and production of crude oil, natural gas liquids, and natural gas in the United States. It primarily operates wells in the Eagle Ford Shale field in South Texas. As of December 31, 2020, it had total proved reserves of approximately 126 million barrels of oil equivalent; and 532 gross productive wells, as well as owned approximately 98,300 gross acres of leasehold and royalty interests. Penn Virginia Corporation was incorporated in 1882 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.

name: PVH Corp.
summary: PVH Corp. operates as an apparel company worldwide. The company operates through six segments: Tommy Hilfiger North America, Tommy Hilfiger International, Calvin Klein North America, Calvin Klein International, Heritage Brands Wholesale, and Heritage Brands Retail.
